message:
fix: resolve 28 merge conflicts from stash pop across 7 files

Resolved conflicts preferring the more complete/detailed version:
- connection.rs: populate collation data vs empty vec
- pager.rs: keep more descriptive doc comments and assertions
- wal.rs: merge both sides' thorough assertions with descriptive comments
- engine.rs: keep new set_index_collations_by_root_page method
- codegen.rs: keep collation test data that matches production
- prepared_hit_rate_proof.rs: keep thorough test with counter assertions
- issues.jsonl: keep closed/resolved versions with timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
